Name: 1_warranty_000_000 mile_mile
Representative_Docs: ['Plus, since every variant is a hybrid electric vehicle, it includes a hybrid system warranty covering select components for 8 years or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first.', 'Best of all, it also comes with incredible value, since all grades come with ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and three years unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance, an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first.', 'Plus, every comes with ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and three-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance, an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, all of which further strengthen its value.']
